learning_outcomes:
1 1.  |  Major Programme:
Knowledge Outcomes (Content): Graduates will have possessed
fundamental/core/inter-disciplinary knowledge of music, including the
following: (1) music theory, (2)
contextual study of music (ethnomusicological, historical, etc.), (3) performance
on a major instrument, (4) multiple musical traditions.
Skills Outcomes: Generic Competencies/Transferable Skills: Graduates will have
acquired transferable generic skills, including: (1) ability to work
independently and in groups, (2) ability to express themselves clearly in
written and spoken English and Chinese, (3) ability to think creatively and
critically.
Professional Skills: Graduates will have
gained a good mastery of the following professional skills: (1) ability to
express themselves about music in written and spoken Chinese and English, (2)
ability to make evidence-based critical judgments about musical performance,
composition, and musical culture, (3) ability to perform at an appropriate
professional level on their major instrument.
Attitude/Value Outcomes Graduates will have
developed a positive attitude towards issues concerning music, including the
following: (1) awareness of and open-minded attitude toward different modes
of musical expression, (2) passion for communicating through music, and (3)
awareness of and appreciation for the significance of music within all
societies.
2.  |  Minor Programme:
Upon the completion of the Minor Programme,
students will have demonstrated basic understanding of fundamental issues
related to the subject, acquired knowledge of some aspects of the subject
with sufficient exposure and at a suitable level to allow further study in
this subject or related subjects or to pursue a related career.

Music Music Applicable to students admitted in 2025-26
Major Programme Requirement
Students
are required to complete a minimum of 66 units of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Faculty
Package:  |  9
MUSC1000 and any two courses from ANTH1020, ARTS1005,
1010, BMBL1001, CHES1101 or 1102, CHLL1900 or 1902 or 1903, CURE1000 or
1400, 1110, ENGE1000, FAAS1900, HIST1000 or 1700 or 1701, JASP1090,
LING1000, PHIL1110, THEO1000, TRAN1000
2.  |  Required
Courses:
(a)  |  Choir
Training courses MUSC1001,
1002, 2001, 2002  |  4
(b)  |  Applied Music courses [(MUSC1011, 1051) or (MUSC1012)], [(MUSC1021,
1061) or (MUSC1022)], [(MUSC2011, 2051) or
(MUSC2012)], [(MUSC2021, 2061) or (MUSC2022)]  |  8
(c)  |  Music, History, and Culture courses MUSC2552, 2562, 2872, 2882  |  8
(d)  |  Theory, Analysis, and Composition courses MUSC1212, 1222, 2252, 2262  |  8
(e)  |  Stream-specific courses (Students
must declare one of the following areas of study) (1) Composition Supporting courses: MUSC3343, and one
course from MUSC3323, 3333, 3373, 3383, 3712, 3722, 3732, 3742 Capstone courses: MUSC3353, 3363 (2) Performance Supporting courses: MUSC3012, 3022 Capstone courses: MUSC4000, 4003 (3) Research Supporting courses: Two courses from MUSC2543,
3213, 3223, 3233, 3243, 3452, 3462, 3472, 3482, 3502, 3512, 3522, 3532, 3533,
3542, 3562, 3582, 3802, 3832, 3852, 3892, 3902, 3912, 3922, 3932, 3942 Capstone courses: MUSC4613, 4623  |  10-11[a]
3.  |  Elective
Courses:
Any MUSC
courses other than the courses taken to fulfill requirement (2) above,
with at least one course from Area 3 and two courses from Area 4, and up
to six units from Area 2C “Other Ensemble Courses”.  |  18-19[a]
Total:  |  66
Explanatory
Note:
1. [a]  |  MUSC courses at 2000 and above level
in Areas 1, 3, 4, 5, and 6 as well as MUSC1000, MUSC1212, MUSC1222, MUSC2022,
MUSC2061, MUSC3022, MUSC3061, MUSC4061 will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification. Students specializing in Composition
Stream are required to take 11 units of stream-specific courses and 18 units
of elective courses, those taking other streams should take 10 units of stream-specific
courses and 19 units of elective courses.

Minor Programme Title Music
Minor Programme
Requirement
Students are
required to complete a minimum of 18 units of courses, with at least 6
units at 3000 or above level, as follows:
Units
1.  |  Required
Courses:  |  7
MUSC1000,
1212, 1222
2.  |  Elective
Courses:
(a)  |  Any 4 units
from the following courses: MUSC2252,
2262, 2552, 2562, 2872, 2882  |  4
(b)  |  Any MUSC courses other than the
courses taken to fulfill requirement (1) and (2a) above, excluding MUSC1012,
1022, 1051, 1061, 2012, 2022, 2051, 2061, 3012, 3022, 3051, 3061, 4000,
4003, 4051, 4061. Courses taken should include at least 6 units of courses at
3000 or above level and not more than 4 units of courses from Area 2B and/or
2C.  |  7
Total:  |  18
Explanatory Note:
1.  |  Students planning to Minor in Music
must have attained at least Grade 5 in theory and instrument/voice in the
examination of the Associated Board of the Royal Schools of Music, or
equivalent, and may be asked to attend an interview.
2.  |  This Minor Programme is not applicable
to students who major in Music.
3.  |  No more than 9 units of courses taken
to fulfill the requirements of the students’ Major Programme(s) and
other Minor Programme(s) respectively can be used to fulfil the requirement
of this Minor Programme.
